headline: Monday discipline: eat clean, move, execute today
summary: Your recent pace slipped to -0.5 kg/week; today rebuild the -0.57 kg/week discipline needed by staying strict on portions and hitting cardio.
details: Today: zero emotional snacking—stick to pre-portioned Huel and whole plant foods, no extras. Hit 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill to drive the deficit home. You're behind schedule because consistency broke down; Monday is where you restart the chain. Every single day matters now.
